## QUERY
story 文件夹在哪里？StoryNode 是如何定义和存储的？

## SCOPE
- Directories: /workspace
- Excludes: node_modules,.godot

## SCHEMA
```json
{"type": "object", "properties": {"story_folder": {"type": "string"}, "story_node_definition": {"type": "string"}, "story_files": {"type": "array", "items": {"type": "string"}}}}
```

## RESULT
## 调查结果

### 1. story 文件夹位置
```
./story/
```
目前包含一个文件：`Introduce.tres`

### 2. StoryNode 定义

**定义文件**：`scripts/Dialog/StoryNode.cs`

```csharp
[GlobalClass]
public partial class StoryNode : Resource
{
    [Export] public string NodeTitle;
    [Export] public string NodeSummary;
    [Export] public string NodeId;
    [Export] public string DialogPath;
    [Export] public Array<string> Conditions;
    [Export] public Array<StoryNodeContent> Choices;
}
```

**关联类型 StoryNodeContent**：`scripts/Dialog/StoryNodeContent.cs`
```csharp
[GlobalClass]
public partial class StoryNodeContent : Resource
{
    [Export] public string ForwardNodeId;
    [Export] public string Content;
}
```

### 3. 存储方式

StoryNode 作为 **Godot Resource** 存储，文件格式为 `.tres`（文本格式的资源文件）。

**示例**：`story/Introduce.tres`
```ini
[gd_resource type="Resource" script_class="StoryNode" format=3 uid="uid://bll0h7kyypot7"]

[ext_resource type="Script" uid="uid://dbftvqbd867ku" path="res://scripts/Dialog/StoryNode.cs" id="1_4il70"]

[resource]
script = ExtResource("1_4il70")
Choices = Array[Object]([null])
```

### 4. 相关文件列表

| 文件路径 | 作用 |
|---------|------|
| `story/Introduce.tres` | StoryNode 资源实例文件 |
| `scripts/Dialog/StoryNode.cs` | StoryNode 类定义 |
| `scripts/Dialog/StoryNodeContent.cs` | StoryNodeContent 类定义（选项内容） |
| `scripts/Dialog/StoryManager.cs` | 故事管理器（对话和AI接入中继） |

### 5. 数据结构图

```
StoryNode (Resource)
├── NodeTitle: string       # 节点标题
├── NodeSummary: string     # 节点摘要
├── NodeId: string          # 节点唯一标识
├── DialogPath: string      # 对话文件路径
├── Conditions: string[]    # 触发条件
└── Choices: StoryNodeContent[]  # 选项列表
    └── StoryNodeContent
        ├── ForwardNodeId: string  # 跳转目标节点ID
        └── Content: string        # 选项显示内容
```
